mapper.select: SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, CASE WHEN s.user_id_1 = #{userId} THEN s.user_id_2 ELSE s.user_id_1 END AS peerId, u.name AS peerName, s.house_id AS houseId, h.title AS houseTitle, s.last_msg_content AS lastMsgContent, s.update_time AS updateTime, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM chat_session s LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = CASE WHEN s.user_id_1 = #{userId} THEN s.user_id_2 ELSE s.user_id_1 END LEFT JOIN house h ON h.id = s.house_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT session_id, COUNT(1) AS unread_count FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 GROUP BY session_id ) unread ON unread.session_id = s.session_id WHERE s.user_id_1 = #{userId} OR s.user_id_2 = #{userId} ORDER BY s.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
